items.title: Mahmoud Khalil vows to continue activism after release | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Mahmoud Khalil vowed to resume his pro-Palestinian activism as he returned to New York a day after he was released on bail from a jail for immigrants.

items.title: Wounded Iranians in Tehran hospital talk about Israeli attacks | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Nasrin, a 38-year-old Tehran resident, said she was 'hurled against the wall' in an Israeli air strike and didn't know how long she was unconscious before being helped to the hospital by a neighbor.

items.title: Poodle joins lifeguard team on Spanish beach
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>🐩 A Standard Poodle named Nilo has joined four labradors at a canine rescue squad at Las Lindas beach near Malaga in Spain, helping lifeguards tow people back to shore. Nilo's handler, Miguel Sanchez-Merenciano, said the poodle's strokes are "perfect" and he uses his tail "like a rudder.”
 
#reuters #poodle #dogs #pets #lifeguard #spain

items.title: Mike Lynch's Bayesian yacht lifted from sea off Sicily | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Experts lifted Mike Lynch's superyacht from the water and began pumping it out 10 months after it sank off the coast of Sicily, killing the British tech tycoon, his daughter and five others. 
#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #mikelynch #bayesian #sicily #europe

items.title: The future of Iran
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article> For decades, Iran was able to project power across the Middle East using its network of proxies. That meant any strikes against it could threaten to trigger a formidable response. But Israel's recent attacks have exposed just how vulnerable Tehran is. In this special episode of Reuters World News, we look at how Iran went from monarchy to Islamic Republic - and what its future could look like.








Sign up for the Reuters Econ World newsletter ⁠here⁠ (https://www.reuters.com/newsletters/reuters-econ-world/) .

items.title: Taiwan seals drone software deal to help deter China
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Taiwan sealed a partnership deal with U.S. and German-based Auterion for drone software battle-tested in Ukraine to help strengthen the island's defenses against growing military threats from giant neighbor China.
 
#drone #war #defense #military #taiwan #china</article>
